routing to a different flow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ci: download built-in extensions before compile, use extensions-ci task

The compile-non-native-extensions-build task downloads 3 built-in extensions
(ms-vscode.js-debug, js-debug-companion, vscode-js-profile-table) from GitHub
if not already cached. Without GITHUB_TOKEN this hits rate limits.

Fix:
- Add 'Download built-in extensions' step (node build/lib/builtInExtensions.ts)
  with GITHUB_TOKEN before the TypeScript compile step, matching VS Code's
  install-builtin-extensions.yml pattern
- Replace separate compile-non-native-extensions-build + compile-extension-media
  steps with the single 'extensions-ci' gulp task (which combines both)

commit.message:
fix(flags): harden stale flag detection gaps (#109)

* feat(m7): RBAC interceptor with role-based permissions (M4.4)

Add auth package for M7 flags service mirroring M5's RBAC pattern:
- Identity extraction from X-User-Email/X-User-Role headers
- Role hierarchy: viewer < analyst < experimenter < admin
- Permission map: viewer (Get/List/Evaluate), experimenter (Create/Update),
  admin (PromoteToExperiment)
- DISABLE_AUTH env var guard for dev/test
- 15 tests: identity, interceptor, permission enforcement, DISABLE_AUTH

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(m7): wire live PromoteToExperiment to M5 CreateExperiment

Close 4 gaps preventing flag→experiment promotion against real M5:
- Add layer_id (required by M5 validation) via FLAG_PROMOTION_LAYER_ID env
- Forward auth headers (X-User-Email/X-User-Role) to M5 via client interceptor
- Set 10s HTTP client timeout (replaces http.DefaultClient)
- Add M5 contract validation to mock (rejects empty required fields)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(flags): harden stale flag detection — exclude promoted flags, add HTTP tests, tiered suggestions

Promoted flags (with promoted_experiment_id set) are now excluded from stale
detection in both MockAuditStore and PostgresAuditStore. Added 6 HTTP endpoint
tests covering default/custom thresholds, empty results, missing audit store
(503), and suggestion tiers. Suggestions now vary by severity: 90-179d
(consider removing), 180-364d (strongly recommend), 365d+ (critical/abandoned).
Also fixed nil-slice JSON encoding to return [] instead of null for empty results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(flags): use IS NULL only for UUID column in stale flag query

The promoted_experiment_id column is UUID type in PostgreSQL, so comparing
to empty string '' causes SQLSTATE 22P02. NULL check alone is sufficient
since UUID columns can only be NULL or a valid UUID.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(callbacks): add logging and fix double-answerCallbackQuery crash

The dev callback handler had no logging and a bug where answerCallbackQuery
was called twice on error (once in the case, once in catch), causing the
catch handler itself to throw an unhandled exception. Also added try-catch
to the top-level callback handler to prevent silent swallowing of errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 1m discovery journal Batch 1 — STOCH+ROC Sharpe 2.60 (94.8% WR scalper), STOCH+CCI Sharpe 2.50

First 1m scalp series. Key findings: MFI has no NT Rust class (unusable on 1m),
RSI/ADX fail on 1m, STOCH remains king. STOCH+ROC 0.64% TP scalper is paper-ready.
Filed vibe-quant-pr80 for BBANDS/DONCHIAN genome support.

commit.message:
fix: Claude Code hooks spec compliance (issue #27) (#29)

- Change HookPayload.tool_response from String to serde_json::Value to
  handle object-valued responses from Claude Code
- Add smart tool_response_text() extraction for known response shapes
  (Read file.content, Bash text/stdout, fallback to JSON serialization)
- Add 5 new lifecycle hooks: SubagentStop, SubagentStart,
  PostToolUseFailure, SessionEnd, PreCompact
- Pass pre-computed response_text into extractors to avoid double
  serialization
- SessionEnd skips if Stop hook already ended the session (preserves
  rich summary)
- Fix list_sessions method shadowing with UFCS trait calls
- Reduce checkpoint batch fetch from 50 to 15
- Add spec fields: hook_event_name, transcript_path, permission_mode,
  tool_use_id
- Add comprehensive tests for all new commands and edge cases

Closes #27

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix DualSide DTE: count SPX expirations instead of calendar days

Fetch one wide chain (3-10 DTE window), extract all available SPX
expirations sorted by date, pick 1st as 5DTE and 2nd as 6DTE.
This ensures the two sides always land on different expiration dates.

Add custom three-zone budget gauge app icon

Replaces the generic stock speedometer with a purpose-built gauge that
visually communicates the app's core concept: green = on track, yellow
= approaching limit, red = over budget. Needle sits in the green zone.

Generated via generate_icons.py (Pillow, 4x supersampling + LANCZOS).
All five sizes covered: 192, 512 (standard + maskable), 180 (Apple).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix G-code generation, add overlap algorithms, and update GUI

- Fix single-material Aerotech and pressure G-code writers to use
  configurable axis names (axis_1) instead of hardcoded Z, and add
  proper G90/G91 mode switches and pass start/end sequences
- Add original "retrace" overlap algorithm alongside "consecutive",
  with selection via CLI (--overlap_algorithm) and GUI dropdown
- Fix material classification to use last node instead of second node
- Fix artven boundary swap to write corrected values back to points array
- Correct gap extension overshoot in G-code base writer
- Add operator centering/calibration instructions to pipeline output
- Add original network, downsampled, and overlap plots
- Update default flow rate to experimentally determined value
- Update README with conda setup instructions and protocol docs

Pre-scale music buffer instead of relying on Tone.js Gain nodes

Scale music buffer samples directly to target volume before
offline rendering, bypassing potential Tone.js gain issues that
were producing unexpectedly high output peaks (2.05 vs expected 0.6).

commit.message:
feat: remove CoinGecko entirely, replace with DexScreener + Jupiter

- solana-market.js: replace all 4 CoinGecko fetches with DexScreener batch
  fetch for ~40 hardcoded top Solana token mints; zero rate limits, no API key
- token-registry.js: remove CoinGecko /coins/{id} fallback from resolveToken;
  all tokens now pre-registered via registerMint() at market-fetch time
- prompts.js: [NEW]/[established] tag now based on ageHours (new launch) not
  _dexscreener flag (which is now true for all tokens)
- .env.example: remove COINGECKO_API_KEY section
- SOL, change1h/24h for regime classifier now sourced from DexScreener pairs

docs: add WebFetch → hybrid fetch_document conversion plan (v1.2.0)

Comprehensive implementation spec for replacing SDK built-in WebFetch
with a custom MCP tool (fetch_document) that tries direct HTTP fetch
first, then falls back to Exa /contents on 403/timeout. Covers 10 files,
5-phase checklist (A-E), ~75 checkboxes, frontend observability updates,
and Exa endpoint terminology clarification.

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline job detail with status progression and action queue

Rewrites offline.html to include both schedule list and job detail view
with working action buttons. Engineers can now progress jobs (Start
Travel, I've Arrived, Complete, Return Travel, End Travel) while fully
offline — actions queue to IndexedDB and sync when connectivity returns.

- Hash-based routing (#job/{id}) for seamless schedule→job navigation
- Service worker extracts job ID from /scheduling/jobs/{uuid} URLs and
  deep-links to offline.html#job/{id} when network unavailable
- GPS capture on status changes (best-effort, non-blocking)
- Offline notes with [Offline] prefix
- Optimistic status updates in IndexedDB cache
- Auto-redirect to real pages when connectivity returns
- Self-contained vanilla JS — zero framework dependencies

commit.message:
Layer5全ページの演出タイミングを約1/3に短縮（251-282）

- 251-260: フェードイン間隔 2500→800ms
- 261: タイプライター 30→15ms、微震動・赤フラッシュ 200→100ms
- 262-270: グリッチ間隔・duration全て1/3、タイプライター15ms
- 271-277: gapMin/gapMax 1/3、タイプライター15ms
- 278: ログ行間待ち 2000→700ms、白フラッシュ 200→100ms
- 279: テキスト遅延 [1s,3s,5s]、リンク表示8s
- 280: テキスト1s/3s、フェードアウト7s、遷移13s
- 281: フェードイン0.8s間隔、バックスペース20ms、カーソル1s、黒画面2s
- 282: 初期黒画面1s、段落間隔1.5s

commit.message:
fix(perf): revert dynamic FeaturesSection + font preload (LCP regression)

Dynamic import created a double waterfall (chunk load → GSAP load) that
pushed LCP from 2.4s to 3.3s. Mono font preload removal caused CLS 0.019.

Reverted: static FeaturesSection import, useStaggerIn, font preload.
Kept: no gradient animation (TBT win), requestIdleCallback easter egg.
